silver

silver reason
Fukuda Yumi Because it was nice how to make questions.
Fukuda Yumi Her presentation was relax.
Fukuda Yumi Her voice was so clear and content was interesting
Kani Momoka Because her pronunciation was clear and easy to understand.
Kani Momoka Her presentation had many gesture and easy to listen.
Kani Momoka I’m interested in food waste too, so
Kani Momoka It was impressive that she spoke without looking at her script.
Kani Momoka Not reading
Kani Momoka She did her presentation without looking script.
Kani Momoka She gave her presentation without reading from a script
Kani Momoka She had memorized almost the entire script.
Kani Momoka She made efforts that she was talking as far forward as she could.
Kani Momoka She talked without a script.
Kani Momoka The content is good.
Nakabayashi Fumi Because the content was interesting.
Nakabayashi Fumi Her content is interesting to me.
Nakabayashi Fumi I like vegetables. So her presentation sounds interesting!
Sekino Koto No reading.
Sekino Koto She had confidence when she gave her presentation.
Sekino Koto The content was interesting and well prepared.
